full_text:
Xu Rong 徐榮
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Rong (徐榮)was born in Xuantu. Defeated Cao Cao and Sun Jian in battle, but never able to press it home. Xu Rong was affiliated with Dong Zhuo and the Han Dynasty. Xu Rong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
